title: Apple Intelligence - Apple Developer
notes: Apple states Apple Intelligence integrates into apps via App Intents and exposes models through Foundation Models.

title: Meet the Foundation Models framework - WWDC25
notes: Public on-device model API; guided generation, tool calling, sessions, transcript handling.

title: Bring your app to Siri - WWDC24
notes: SiriKit/App Intents/Assistant Schemas path for exposing app actions to Apple Intelligence/Siri.

title: Develop for Shortcuts and Spotlight with App Intents - WWDC25
notes: Use Model action, App Intents in Shortcuts/Spotlight on Mac, model route choices.

title: Apple Intelligence and privacy on Mac
notes: Mac Apple Intelligence Report can show PCC requests; useful as controlled-trial side channel.

title: apple/security-pcc
notes: Apple repository with components for PCC security/privacy verification. Context only for local IntelligenceFlow work.

title: Exposing Hidden Interfaces: LLM-Guided Type Inference for Reverse Engineering macOS Private Frameworks
notes: MOTIF: LLM-agent type inference using Objective-C metadata, binary inspection, tool calls, and linter constraints.

title: The Apple Wiki: /System/Library/PrivateFrameworks
notes: Lists IntelligenceFlow family names; descriptions are unofficial and should be treated as discovery hints.

title: blacktop/ipsw-diffs IntelligenceFlow diff
notes: Shared-cache diff signal for IntelligenceFlow path, version, UUID/function/string counts.

title: blacktop/ipsw-diffs IntelligenceFlowPlannerSupport diff
notes: Shared-cache diff signal for large PlannerSupport binary.

title: blacktop/ipsw-diffs IntelligenceFlowRuntime diff
notes: Shared-cache diff signal for Runtime binary.

title: NewOSXBook entitlement record: IntelligenceFlowDiagnostics
notes: Shows com.apple.intelligenceflow.context and Biome read-only streams for IntelligenceFlow diagnostics; cross-OS hint, not macOS proof.

title: ipsw docs: Parse MachO files
notes: Mach-O, DSC, entitlements, ObjC/Swift dump workflows.

title: keith/dyld-shared-cache-extractor
notes: Extract macOS dyld shared cache for local analysis.

title: Local macOS 26.2 build 25C56 IntelligenceFlow probe summary
notes: Build-specific dyld, entitlement, launchd, resource, and header-validation evidence generated on the host.
